data.title: Teton releases 2025 holiday gift guide with products for all outdoor enthusiasts, affordable & reliable. #outdoorgifts
data.description: Teton, a well-known outdoor brand based in Salt Lake City, revealed a range of gift ideas on Dec. 5, 2025. These products cater to both outdoor experts and beginners, offering comfort, reliability, and convenience. The brand is recognized for its affordable yet high-quality items.

data.title: Kulicke & Soffa declares quarterly dividend of $0.205 per share of common stock, payable to shareholders.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Kulicke and Soffa Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: KLIC) disclosed the approval from its Board of Directors for a quarterly dividend of $0.205 per common stock share. This dividend will be distributed to shareholders on...

data.title: Academy Sports & Outdoors declares $0.13 quarterly cash dividend on December 4, 2025, post-fiscal quarter ended November 1.
data.description: On December 4, 2025, Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.13 per share for the fiscal quarter that ended on November 1, 2025. The company, listed as "Academy" on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol ASO, made this announcement from Katy, Texas.

data.title: USMNT's Gio Reyna and Joe Scally mentor ISA players at Borussia Mönchengladbach, promoting U.S. pathway to Bundesliga.
data.description: Elite young American soccer players are making waves in Germany as part of the U.S. Pathway to Bundesliga program. Promising talents like Gio Reyna and Joe Scally are showcasing their skills on Instagram Reel, offering viewers a glimpse into their journey. Recently, players from the International Soccer Academy (ISA) in North America had the opportunity to connect with members of the U.S. Men's National Team (USMNT) and Borussia Dortmund. This initiative signifies a crucial stepping stone for American youth athletes aiming to compete at a high level in Europe.

data.title: Vindral, a Swedish live streaming platform, partners with Akamai for low latency streaming. Silver award winner in SportsPro. Serving clients for 10+ years in sports, auctions, iGaming, live events.
data.description: In UMEÅ, Sweden on December 5, 2025, the Swedish live streaming service Vindral has successfully provided ultra-low latency streaming to clients in sports, auctions, iGaming, and live events for over a decade. The platform's outstanding performance was recognized with a Silver award in the renowned SportsPro Media Awards.

data.title: CFTC greenlights US spot crypto trading on all registered exchanges, boosting institutional access.
data.description: The approval has been granted for spot crypto trading to commence with any exchange that is CFTC-registered, marking a significant step towards increased institutional adoption in the sector. This milestone eliminates a key obstacle and opens up opportunities for more widespread participation.

data.title: NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: NREF) announces $0.53125 dividend/share for 8.50% Series A Preferred Stock. Payable on Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: In Dallas on December 5, 2025, NexPoint Real Estate Finance, Inc. (NYSE: NREF) disclosed a dividend declaration for its 8.50% Series A Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock (NYSE: NREF PRA), averaging $0.53125 per share. This dividend is scheduled for disbursement on January 26, 2026, to...

data.title: India's DRI reports smugglers are using stablecoins (eg. USDT) over hawala networks in criminal activities.
data.description: A recent report from the anti-smuggling agency cautions about the increasing use of stablecoins, such as USDT, in transnational criminal activities. It highlights that stablecoins are gradually replacing traditional hawala networks for illicit operations. This evolution poses significant challenges in combating financial crimes, with stablecoins serving as a preferred mode of transaction due to their relative anonymity and convenience. The report underscores the urgent need for regulatory measures and international cooperation to address the growing misuse of stablecoins in criminal activities.

data.title: Neurophet showcased 'Neurophet AQUA AD' at RSNA 2025, demonstrating brain imaging solutions for Alzheimer's treatment safety.
data.description: During an AI Theater session, cutting-edge brain imaging analysis solutions were showcased, such as 'Neurophet AQUA AD,' designed for tracking negative impacts linked to Alzheimer's disease treatments. The demonstration included clinical cases demonstrating enhanced safety in administering anti-amyloid therapy. This presentation highlighted advancements in the field and emphasized the importance of monitoring adverse effects. Such technology plays a crucial role in ensuring the well-being of individuals undergoing treatment for Alzheimer's disease.

data.title: Gametime and Barstool Sports collaborate on "12 Days of Gametime" giveaway, offering daily rewards and a $5,000 grand prize.
data.description: A Sweepstakes marking 12 years of fan memories offers daily prizes and a grand prize of $5,000. The mobile ticketing platform, Gametime, based in San Francisco, unveiled the "12 Days of" celebration on December 5, 2025. Participants stand a chance to win various rewards each day leading up to the grand prize of $5,000.

data.title: Three women leaders at WOW! recognized for their impact in the broadband industry. Leaders - Teresa Elder, Leslie Peabody, and Misty Jensen.
data.description: Three individuals, Teresa Elder, Leslie Peabody, and Misty Jensen, have been commended for their exceptional leadership and influence in the broadband sector. The recognition was bestowed upon them in Englewood, Colorado on December 5, 2025. This announcement was made by WOW! Internet, TV & Phone, which is a prominent broadband services company listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol WOW. Teresa Elder and her colleagues were acknowledged for their outstanding contributions to the industry.

data.title: Foundree42 launched, offers Salesforce consulting for modern enterprise stack. Focus on lean teams, smart architecture. Led by seasoned delivery.
data.description: A new company, Foundree42, was founded on December 5, 2025, with a focus on providing consulting services tailored for modern enterprise platforms. The company's model emphasizes smaller teams, efficient architecture, and adaptable solutions to keep pace with evolving business needs. The leadership team at Foundree42 brings a wealth of experience to the table to support their approach.

data.title: Seegene expands in Europe with French subsidiary, ninth overseas. France is second-largest market for molecular diagnostics.
data.description: France has recently been established as Seegene's ninth international sales subsidiary, making it the company's third presence in Europe alongside Italy and Germany. The country is recognized as Europe's second-largest market for molecular diagnostics. This growth is mainly attributed to the increasing demand for testing services in areas such as sexually transmitted infections, gastrointestinal conditions, and respiratory viruses. France's significance as a key market for Seegene's expansion is underscored by these factors.

data.title: MultiTech launches new LoRaWAN® DWS/ATH Sensor for facilities monitoring, enhancing efficiency.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Mounds View, Minnesota, MultiTech unveiled its latest product, the DWS/ATH LoRaWAN® Door, Window, Temperature & Humidity Sensor. This innovative sensor is part of the company's Industrial IoT hardware offerings and aims to assist facility operators in decreasing energy consumption. MultiTech, a prominent global provider in this industry, is known for delivering cutting-edge solutions to its customers.

data.title: MoneyLion's Holiday Heist Giveaway provides $2,000 to 50 winners from Dec 5 to Jan 24 for financial relief.
data.description: Starting from December 5 until January 24, a lucky recipient will be awarded $2,000 daily for financial assistance. Recent findings from a MoneyLion survey indicate that a significant number of Americans are at risk of exceeding their holiday spending limits. The study reveals that households in 29 states are expected to succumb to this trend...

data.title: Old Forester releases new Prohibition Era Still Proof bourbon in its 117 Series, debuting on Dec. 5, 2025.
data.description: Old Forester, the first bottled bourbon in America, will be launching its new limited edition Prohibition Era Still Proof on December 5, 2025, commemorating Repeal Day. The release is part of their renowned 117 Series and is set to captivate bourbon enthusiasts.

data.title: Research by Dodge & CMiC shows 87% of contractors optimistic about AI's impact on construction industry.
data.description: In Boston, Dodge Construction Network (Dodge) and CMiC have collaborated to present a new report, "AI for Contractors," analyzing the impact of artificial intelligence on the construction sector. The study found that 87% of contractors anticipate AI will significantly influence the industry, foreseeing widespread changes. Over the years, construction companies have struggled to effectively utilize the data they gather. AI solutions are set to address this issue and drive transformation in the sector, marking a pivotal moment in the industry's evolution.
